body.title: pe: Seed OBSERVE node — two-pass grep+read into basket[actual]
body.result: OBSERVE step added: two-pass grep+read. Pass 1: _extract_grep_patterns from description, grep each plan_file → line_ranges. Pass 2: read 40-line section around hit → basket[actual]. 45 tests.
body.description: Pass 1: grep_for(pattern derived from ticket, file) → basket[line_range]. Pass 2: read_file(file, offset=line_range) → basket[actual]. Uses L3 OBSERVE template. No LLM. Tests: basket[actual] contains only the relevant section, not full file.
